title: Master of Puppets
why_this_song: Master of Puppets by Metallica (1986) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 35 times; first heard in: "Obey your master (master)"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Come crawling faster (faster)"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Just call my name 'cause I'll hear you scream"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Obey your master (master)"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Just call my name 'cause I'll hear you scream"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Master of puppets, I'm pulling your strings

Twisting your mind and smashing your dreams
Blinded by me, you can't see a thing

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "master" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "master" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "faster" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "faster" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: End of passion play, crumbling away
Laughter, laughter, laughing at my cries

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Never-ending maze, drift on numbered days

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Master of Puppets" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Master of Puppets" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Master of Puppets", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Master of Puppets", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Master of Puppets" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Master of Puppets" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
